[[BLOCK:srt_254]]
Speaker 1: Okay.

[[BLOCK:srt_255]]
Speaker 1: All right.

[[BLOCK:srt_256]]
Speaker 1: First of all, congratulations on successfully completing your studies at Golden Gate University (金门大学) and earning your degrees.

[[BLOCK:srt_257]]
Speaker 1: I know that many of you balanced full-time work while completing your studies.

[[BLOCK:srt_258]]
Speaker 1: 7, 6.

[[BLOCK:srt_259]]
Speaker 1: Let me say that again.

[[BLOCK:srt_260]]
Speaker 1: It’s 9, 6, 9, 9, 6.

[[BLOCK:srt_261]]
Speaker 1: Once again, congratulations on successfully completing your degree programs at Golden Gate University.

[[BLOCK:srt_262]]
Speaker 1: And welcome to Golden Gate University’s global alumni family. We now have more than 60,000 alumni around the world, and we are truly delighted to welcome you as our newest members.

[[BLOCK:srt_263]]
Speaker 1: I also want to commend you for your hard work. Earning a degree is no small achievement.

[[BLOCK:srt_264]]
Speaker 1: Many of you managed careers and family responsibilities while staying committed to your studies. Your dedication and perseverance are deeply admirable.

[[BLOCK:srt_265]]
Speaker 2: Let’s revise that sentence.
